name: Turkish Towel
preceding_figure_names: Advanced Hip Twist, Aida, Chase, Closed Hip Twist, Cuban Break RF, Curl, Follow My Leader, Hockey Stick, Open Basic Movement, Open Hip Twist, Spiral, Split Cuban Break LF, Spot or Switch Turn To L (Lady to R), Three Cha Cha Chas Forward, Time Step RF
following_figure_names: Alemana, Open Basic Movement (Open Basic; Or, 1,2 of Open Basic to Three Cha Cha Chas Back; Or 1-5 of Open Basic to Natural Top), Time Step LF, Open Hip Twist, Curl, Cuban Break LF, Split Cuban Break LF, Chase, Sweetheart, Follow My Leader
notes: Alternative ending: "2": LF fwd, "3" RF fwd, spiral, then a three step turn on "4&1".

steps.action: Same as Alemana from Open Position | No turn
Compact Chasse RLR. End RF to side in L Shadow Position, Lady behind Man.
comments: Lower R arm, slowly taking it behind back.
On Step 10, take L to L hand hold, slightly to L side at hip level.

steps.action: LF back in LSP, toe turned out.
Transfer weight to RF
LF to side to chasse LRL. End in R Shadow Position, Lady behind.
comments: Slowly reverse arm positions to L arm behind back, R hand slightly to R side

steps.action: RF back in RSP, toe turned out.
Transfer weight to LF
RF to side to chasse RLR. End in L Shadow Position, Lady behind.
comments: Slowly reverse arm positions to R arm behind back, L hand slightly to L side

steps.action: Release L hand hold on count "4". On count "1", R arm down and fwd, then release R to R hand hold.
Same as steps 6-10 of Hockey Stick, end in Open Position.

steps.timing: Take required hold at the end.
steps.action: Take required hold at the end.
RF fwd in LSP, toe turned out. Behind Man's back. RF to his L.
comments: Moving behind Man's back to end LF side and slightly fwd in L Shadow Position, Man in front.

steps.action: LF fwd in RSP, toe turned out.
comments: Behind Man's back, LF to his R.

steps.action: Transfer weight to LF
RF to side to chase RLR, moving behind Man's back to R Shadow Position, Man in front.
comments: RF to side to chase RLR, moving behind Man's back to R Shadow Position, Man in front.

steps.action: LF to side to chasse LRL, moving behind Man's back to L Shadow Position, Man in front.
comments: 2: LF fwd in RSP, toe turned out. Behind Man's back, LF to his R.

steps.action: Transfer weight to RF
LF to side to chasse LRL, moving behind Man's back to L Shadow Position, Man in front.
comments: Slowly reverse arm positions to R arm behind back, L hand slightly to L side

steps.action: Same as steps 11-14
RF fwd and slightly to side in RSP, then turn on RF allowing LF to cross in front without weight (Spiral Turn)
comments: Another option: Do normal RF side. Then, follow with alternative ending below.

steps.action: Same as steps 6-10 of Hockey Stick, end in Open Position.
comments: Alternative ending: "2": LF fwd, "3" RF fwd, spiral, then a three step turn on "4&1".

steps.timing: Take required hold at the end.
steps.action: Take required hold at the end.
